allow: Bash(git -C /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books ls-files --others --exclude-standard | head -20; git -C /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books ls-files --ignored --exclude-standard | grep -i env)
Bash(git -C /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books cat-file -t HEAD:.gitignore 2>&1 || echo "NO .gitignore COMMITTED"; git -C /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books ls-files | grep -i "\\.env" 2>&1)
Bash(ls /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books/scripts/ && cat /c/Users/Kevin/Projects/books/scripts/*.sql 2>/dev/null || echo "No SQL files in scripts")
